creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a fully functional audio system (I listen to music all the time and use my FreeBSD system to live DJ via audio/idjc) that is not detected by net-im/ekiga.

I have a fully functional video web cam that is detected and configured by webcamd that is not detected by net-im/ekiga.

Is this port actually working or do I have to dig into it?
